_comment: BUSINESS LOGIC DEFAULTS — Do not change these unless updating UI/workflow rules. Project-specific values are in config/project.json
compass_app_label_comment: UI label for the Compass application selector. Change only if Compass is relabeled in your Palantir tenant.
default_drivability_comment: Default answer for drivability questions. Typically 'Yes' or 'No' depending on business rules.
default_opcode_comment: Default opcode when creating work items. Examples: 'PM Gas', 'PM Glass', etc.
glass_opcode_primary_comment: Primary opcode for glass-related work items. Used when damage type indicates glass work.
glass_opcode_fallback_comment: Fallback opcode if primary is unavailable. Used when 'Glass Repair/Replace' is not selectable.
completion_note_comment: Text appended to work item notes when marking as complete. Examples: 'Done', 'Completed', 'Closed'.
warmup_mva_comment: Dummy MVA for Selenium browser warmup. Same value as orchestrator config.
delay_seconds_comment: Default wait time (seconds) for UI element visibility. Adjust for slow/fast networks.
mva_entry_delay_seconds_comment: Wait time (seconds) when entering MVA codes. Increase if OCR or data entry is slow.
logging_comment: Logging configuration. level: DEBUG (verbose), INFO (normal), ERROR (errors only). format: log message template.
